meaning: v.轻摇,摇动,摇曳,啮合n.轻摇,摇动,啮合扣
examples: The paper discusses the method of optimistic designing of joggle mechanism of plastic molding press.
The light is still sombrous and the trees still joggle as before. It ofen gives me some hallucination.
While working , the teeth of belt and the teeth of pulley joggle each other to transmit the motion and the dynamic force.
